pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if source/target levels remain at 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin version to support Java 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older plugin versions may not support the 'release' flag or Java 21 language features correctly.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace separate source and target configuration with the unified release flag in maven-compiler-plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using 'release' is the recommended modern approach for cross-compilation and ensures consistent toolchain usage for Java 21.
